title: [MTR4] Stepford Connect Coaches
description: Adding coaches from SCR to use with the Class 68
body:
# Stepford Connect Coaches

Want some coaches to run with the Class 68? Here you go!

**(The Class 68 is included in another pack.)**


## Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Hitachi Rail, Stepford County Railway, Stepford Connect, Transport Fever 2, the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, or cw_315.
